# Integration Test Scenarios - Cart Icon Feature

## Instructions

Use **Prompt 3** from the Test Scenario Generation document in M365 Copilot:

```
Now generate 20 integration test scenarios for the Cart Icon feature.

Focus on testing interactions between multiple components:

**1. CartContext + CartIcon Component (5 scenarios)**
- State updates reflected in UI immediately
- Badge updates when context state changes
- Multiple cart operations in sequence work correctly
- Context provides correct itemCount to icon
- Icon re-renders only when itemCount changes (performance)

**2. CartContext + Products Page (5 scenarios)**
- Add to cart button updates cart state correctly
- Multiple products added from Products page update badge
- Same product added multiple times increases quantity (not duplicates)
- Cart state persists when navigating away from Products
- Toast notification appears when adding from Products page

**3. CartContext + localStorage (5 scenarios)**
- Cart saved to localStorage on every cart operation
- Cart loaded from localStorage on page load/refresh
- localStorage data format correct (JSON structure)
- localStorage errors handled gracefully (disabled, quota exceeded)
- Concurrent tab modifications handled (multiple browser tabs)

**4. CartIcon + Header + Navigation (5 scenarios)**
- Cart icon integrated correctly in header layout
- Header responsive with cart icon on mobile/tablet/desktop
- Cart icon click routes to /cart page via React Router
- Navigation preserves cart state when moving between pages
- Cart icon maintains correct position across all breakpoints

Use the same markdown table format:

| Test ID | Test Name | Priority | Type | Preconditions | Test Steps | Expected Results | Related Requirements |

Test ID format: TS-CART-I-001 through TS-CART-I-020 (I = Integration)

Generate all 20 integration test scenarios.
```
